_comment: EXAMPLE calibration set documenting the format for calibrate.mjs. NOT real data. A real set is produced by running the judge on the stratified sample and recording, per dimension, {judge, reference[, human2]} per item. 'bootstrap' dims take reference from the deterministic AC vector (free); 'human' dims take reference from human rater #1 and human2 from a second rater (omit human2 when solo -> reduced-confidence).
